name: Sacred Texts RAG Agent v2
description: Specialized RAG agent for Sacred Texts study using AstraDB vector store with external knowledge sources (Wikipedia, arXiv, Exa). Queries intelligently routed by GPT 5.2 agent.

search_query.name: search_query
search_query.info: The query to search against the sacred texts vector database.

collection_name.name: collection_name
collection_name.info: The AstraDB collection containing sacred texts embeddings.

top_k.name: top_k
top_k.info: Number of similar documents to retrieve.

astra_token.name: astra_token
astra_token.info: AstraDB API token with access to the vector collection.

embedding_dimension.name: embedding_dimension
embedding_dimension.info: Dimension of vector embeddings (1536 for OpenAI text-embedding-3-large).

openai_api_key.name: openai_api_key
openai_api_key.info: OpenAI API key for generating query embeddings.

code.name: code

node.description: Search the vectorized archive of Sacred Texts stored in AstraDB using pre-computed embeddings.

search_query.name: search_query
search_query.info: The query to search on Wikipedia.

num_results.name: num_results
num_results.info: Number of Wikipedia articles to retrieve (max 5).

code.name: code

node.description: Search Wikipedia for contextual knowledge, historical background, cultural information, religious history, biographical details, and general encyclopedic information.
